title: The Dungeoning
short_description: The Dungeoning is a difficult action platformer with character levelling, set in a procedurally generated dungeon.
description: The Dungeoning is a difficult action platformer with character levelling, set in a procedurally generated dungeon. Kill enemies, level up using experience and master varied weapons and magic. Collect gold to spend with traders and buy better weapons. Try NG+ and beyond for an extra challenge.
